scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && bun build ../../backend/src/index.ts --outdir dist/backend --target bun --define process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' && cd ../../frontend && bunx paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide && bunx svelte-kit sync && bunx vite build --config vite.package.config.ts && DOCSMINT_FRONTEND_SSR=1 bunx vite build --config vite.package.config.ts && cd ../packages/sdk && bun run scripts/write-frontend-declarations.ts
